script.name: plugin.logistics.manage
script.sourceplaintext:
$tmp = get PID $network.name = $a.networkData['name'] $a.pds[$network.name] = $tmp $table.jobs = $a.networkData['jobs'] if not $table.jobs $table.jobs = table alloc $a.networkData['jobs'] = $table.jobs end $table.usingships = $a.networkData['using.ships'] if not $table.usingships $table.usingships = table alloc $a.networkData['using.ships'] = $table.usingships end $table.imports = $a.networkData['imports'] if not $table.imports $table.imports = table alloc $a.networkData['imports'] = $table.imports end $table.exports = $a.networkData['exports'] if not $table.exports $table.exports = table alloc $a.networkData['exports'] = $table.exports end
$table.exclude = table alloc
$last.reset = playing time
while not $a.networkData['deleted'] @ = wait randomly from 10000 to 20000 ms
do if is a new script version available return null
* Check status of each ship gosub sub.CheckStations gosub sub.CheckShips
* Get Jobs gosub sub.Run
* reset blacklst $time = playing time if ( $last.reset + 1200 ) < $time $table.exclude = table alloc $last.reset = playing time end end return null
sub.CheckStations: $table.stations = $a.networkData['stations'] $next = get next key: table=$table.stations key=null while $next $station = $next $next = get next key: table=$table.stations key=$next if not $station -> exists remove key $station from table $table.stations end end endsub
sub.CheckShips: $table.ships = $a.networkData['ships'] $next = get next key: table=$table.ships key=null while $next $ship = $next $next = get next key: table=$table.ships key=$next if not $ship -> exists remove key $ship from table $table.ships end end
$next = get next key: table=$table.usingships key=null while $next $ship = $next $next = get next key: table=$table.usingships key=$next
if not $ship -> exists $data = $table.usingships[$ship] $status = $data[5] $job.amt = $data[3] $job.ware = $data[0] if $status < 2 $station = $data[1] $tmp = $table.exports[$station][$job.ware] $tmp = $tmp - $job.amt if $tmp <= 0 $table = $table.exports[$station] remove key $job.ware from table $table skip if size of table $table remove key $station from table $table.exports else $table.exports[$station][$job.ware] = $tmp end end if $status < 5 $station = $data[2] $tmp = $table.imports[$station][$job.ware] $tmp = $tmp - $job.amt if $tmp <= 0 $table = $table.imports[$station] remove key $job.ware from table $table skip if size of table $table remove key $station from table $table.imports else $table.imports[$station][$job.ware] = $tmp end end remove key $ship from table $table.usingships remove key $ship from table $table.exclude else $job = $table.usingships[$ship] @ if [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.dojob : Ship=$ship Job=$job Data=$a.networkData remove key $ship from table $table.usingships end end end endsub
sub.Run: $table.stations = $a.networkData['stations'] $table.ships = $a.networkData['ships'] gosub sub.BuildWareTable $table = clone table $table.ships while size of table $table @ $ship = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.findship : Using=$table.usingships Ships=$table Exclude=$table.usingships skip if $ship break if $ship remove key $ship from table $table
$exclude = $table.exclude[$ship] if not $exclude $exclude = table alloc $table.exclude[$ship] = $exclude end $ship.data = $table.ships[$ship] @ $job = [THIS] -> call script plugin.logistics.findjob : Network Data=$a.networkData Products=$table.products Resources=$table.resouces Ship Data=$ship.data Imports=$table.imports Exports=$table.exports Exclude Sectors=$exclude if $job gosub sub.DoJob break end @ = wait 10 ms end end endsub
sub.DoJob: $job.ware = $job[0] $job.supplier = $job[1] $job.station = $job[2] $job.amt = $job[3] $table.usingships[$ship] = $job
$table = $table.exports[$job.supplier] if not $table $table = table alloc $table.exports[$job.supplier] = $table end $amt = $table[$job.ware] skip if $amt $amt = 0 $amt = $amt + $job.amt $table[$job.ware] = $amt
$table = $table.imports[$job.station] if not $table $table = table alloc $table.imports[$job.station] = $table end $amt = $table[$job.ware] skip if $amt $amt = 0 $amt = $amt + $job.amt $table[$job.ware] = $amt endsub
sub.BuildWareTable: $table.products = table alloc $table.resouces = table alloc if $table.stations $station = get next key: table=$table.stations key=null while $station $data = $table.stations[$station]
$table.to = $table.products $table.from = $data[3] gosub sub.AddWares $table.to = $table.resouces $table.from = $data[2] gosub sub.AddWares
$station = get next key: table=$table.stations key=$station end end endsub
sub.AddWares: $sub.ware = get next key: table=$table.from key=null while $sub.ware $sub.amt = $station -> get true amount of ware $sub.ware in cargo bay $tmp = $table.to[$sub.ware] skip if $tmp $tmp = 0 $tmp = $tmp + $sub.amt $table.to[$sub.ware] = $tmp $sub.ware = get next key: table=$table.from key=$sub.ware end endsub
return null

line.text: is a new script version available
